name: Alastor
description:
“Oh, darling, you break my heart!” He put a hand to his head as if he were swooning. If there has been someone who was more dramatic than you had just been, it was him.

(FemPov, this comes from a FANFICTION on AO3 named Dapper Dresser, please read it it’s so good- tho it’s discontinued)
creator: Nikushxmi
